nodes.x: Be merciful unto me, O God, be merciful unto me: for my soul trusteth in thee: yea, in the shadow of thy wings will I make my refuge, until these calamities be overpast.
Have mercy upon me, O God, according to thy lovingkindness: according unto the multitude of thy tender mercies blot out my transgressions.
For thus saith the Lord—I, the Lord, am merciful and gracious unto those who fear me, and delight to honor those who serve me in righteousness and in truth unto the end.
Have mercy upon me, O Lord; consider my trouble which I suffer of them that hate me, thou that liftest me up from the gates of death:
I entreated thy favour with my whole heart: be merciful unto me according to thy word.
I said, Lord, be merciful unto me: heal my soul; for I have sinned against thee.
I will cry unto God most high; unto God that performeth all things for me.
He shall cry unto me, Thou art my father, my God, and the rock of my salvation.
Hearken unto the voice of my cry, my King, and my God: for unto thee will I pray.
When I cry unto thee, then shall mine enemies turn back: this I know; for God is for me.
Lord, I cry unto thee: make haste unto me; give ear unto my voice, when I cry unto thee.
And now, verily I say unto you, and what I say unto one I say unto all, be of good cheer, little children; for I am in your midst, and I have not forsaken you;
He shall send from heaven, and save me from the reproach of him that would swallow me up. Selah. God shall send forth his mercy and his truth.
But God will redeem my soul from the power of the grave: for he shall receive me. Selah.
God be merciful unto us, and bless us; and cause his face to shine upon us; Selah.
God shall likewise destroy thee for ever, he shall take thee away, and pluck thee out of thy dwelling place, and root thee out of the land of the living. Selah.
All the earth shall worship thee, and shall sing unto thee; they shall sing to thy name. Selah.
Salvation belongeth unto the Lord: thy blessing is upon thy people. Selah.
My soul is among lions: and I lie even among them that are set on fire, even the sons of men, whose teeth are spears and arrows, and their tongue a sharp sword.
Behold, all souls are mine; as the soul of the father, so also the soul of the son is mine: the soul that sinneth, it shall die.
For mine enemies speak against me; and they that lay wait for my soul take counsel together,
(Yea, a sword shall pierce through thy own soul also,) that the thoughts of many hearts may be revealed.
Save me from the lion’s mouth: for thou hast heard me from the horns of the unicorns.

I listened, and lo 1 I heard a voice, and it was the voice of my Shepherd, saying, Listen, all ye lions of the forest ; aHd all ye beasts of the field, give ear. Ye have sought to injure the innocent, and your hands have been lifted against the weak, the injured, and the oppressed. Ye have pampered the libertine, the calumniator, and the base. Ye have winked at vice, and trodden under foot the…
Be thou exalted, O God, above the heavens; let thy glory be above all the earth.
Be thou exalted, O God, above the heavens: let thy glory be above all the earth.
Be thou exalted, O God, above the heavens: and thy glory above all the earth;
For thou, Lord, art high above all the earth: thou art exalted far above all gods.
O Lord our Lord, how excellent is thy name in all the earth! who hast set thy glory above the heavens.
But as truly as I live, all the earth shall be filled with the glory of the Lord.
They have prepared a net for my steps; my soul is bowed down: they have digged a pit before me, into the midst whereof they are fallen themselves. Selah.
They gather themselves together, they hide themselves, they mark my steps, when they wait for my soul.
For without cause have they hid for me their net in a pit, which without cause they have digged for my soul.
Though they dig into hell, thence shall mine hand take them; though they climb up to heaven, thence will I bring them down:
When my spirit was overwhelmed within me, then thou knewest my path. In the way wherein I walked have they privily laid a snare for me.
My heart is fixed, O God, my heart is fixed: I will sing and give praise.
O God, my heart is fixed; I will sing and give praise, even with my glory.
For God maketh my heart soft, and the Almighty troubleth me:
The Lord is my strength and my shield; my heart trusted in him, and I am helped: therefore my heart greatly rejoiceth; and with my song will I praise him.
Heal me, O Lord, and I shall be healed; save me, and I shall be saved: for thou art my praise.
Awake up, my glory; awake, psaltery and harp: I myself will awake early.
Awake, psaltery and harp: I myself will awake early.
Awake, awake, Deborah: awake, awake, utter a song: arise, Barak, and lead thy captivity captive, thou son of Abinoam.
Awake, why sleepest thou, O Lord? arise, cast us not off for ever.

Awake! and arise from the dust, and hear the words of a trembling parent, whose limbs ye must soon lay down in the cold and silent grave, from whence no traveler can return; a few more days and I go the way of all the earth.
I will incline mine ear to a parable: I will open my dark saying upon the harp.
I will praise thee, O Lord, among the people: I will sing unto thee among the nations.
I will praise thee, O Lord, among the people: and I will sing praises unto thee among the nations.
I will praise thee with my whole heart: before the gods will I sing praise unto thee.
O praise the Lord, all ye nations: praise him, all ye people.
I will sing of mercy and judgment: unto thee, O Lord, will I sing.
Let the people praise thee, O God; let all the people praise thee.
For thy mercy is great unto the heavens, and thy truth unto the clouds.
For thy mercy is great above the heavens: and thy truth reacheth unto the clouds.
Thy mercy, O Lord, is in the heavens; and thy faithfulness reacheth unto the clouds.
For I have said, Mercy shall be built up for ever: thy faithfulness shalt thou establish in the very heavens.
Not unto us, O Lord, not unto us, but unto thy name give glory, for thy mercy, and for thy truth’s sake.
For the Lord is good; his mercy is everlasting; and his truth endureth to all generations.
Be thou exalted, O God, above the heavens: let thy glory be above all the earth.
Be thou exalted, O God, above the heavens; let thy glory be above all the earth.
